title: ZXSpace Guides
description: Official ZXSpace guides covering gameplay, controls, city defence, achievements, leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins, and everything you need to master the game.

pages.title: Overview
pages.description: Discover ZXSpace and prepare to defend your cities against relentless alien invasions.

pages.title: How to Play
pages.description: Learn the basics of defending your cities, clearing alien waves, and surviving longer.

pages.title: Controls
pages.description: Master cannon movement, auto-fire, and the positioning needed to survive every wave.

pages.title: Game Modes
pages.description: Explore Solo Play and discover the future multiplayer plans for ZXSpace.

pages.title: BarkinMad Coins
pages.description: Earn BarkinMad Coins by defending your cities and unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

pages.title: Achievements
pages.description: Unlock achievements by defending your cities and reaching new gameplay milestones.

pages.title: Leaderboards
pages.description: Compete for the highest score and compare your performance with players around the world.

pages.title: Tips & Strategy
pages.description: Improve your positioning, shield management, and survival skills with practical gameplay advice.

pages.title: Frequently Asked Questions
pages.description: Find answers to the most common questions about ZXSpace.

pages.title: Complete Guide
pages.description: Everything you need to know about ZXSpace in one complete guide.

pages.title: Screenshots
pages.description: Take a visual tour of ZXSpace and explore its gameplay, progression, and city-defence action.
